project_name: Instacart Databricks Free Edition Portfolio Dataset

sampling_method.prior_order_products: Uses the uploaded 750,000-row sample from order_products__prior.csv.
sampling_method.orders: Includes orders referenced by the sampled prior-order rows, plus train orders for the same users when matching train line items are available.
sampling_method.train_order_products: Filtered to train orders belonging to users represented in the prior sample.
sampling_method.dimensions: All products, aisles, and departments are retained.

important_limitations: The prior-order file is an order-level subset of the full Instacart prior dataset.
Customer lifetime and frequency measures must be described as sample-based.
The dataset is suitable for pipeline, data-quality, product, basket, reorder, and sampled customer-behaviour analysis.
Do not claim that customer histories are complete across all Instacart orders.
